suite: EPIC 2E-J Phase C - Final Machine-Readable Result
mappingResult: PASS — unchanged, verified via union-key comparison with/without Review state
xmpResult: PASS — exact text/length/SHA-256 identical before and after complete Observation/Session/Generation-handoff workflow
privacyResult: PASS — zero storage/network/messaging/clipboard/download calls from Observation actions; Session schema data-minimization proven via real getQaSchemaSnapshot() projection
accessibilityResult: CONDITIONAL_PASS — keyboard navigation, focus indicators, ARIA structure, contrast (5/5 targets >=4.5:1), and touch targets (17/17 >=44px, after a genuine defect fix) all PASS; only physical touch hardware remains untested
securityResult: PASS — zero non-comment dangerous-API consumers in Observation/Session modules; zero Observation/Session identifiers in core/; malformed/hostile renderer input (11+6 cases) and HTML/script injection (5 payloads) all safely handled after a genuine defect fix

defectsFoundAndFixed.defect: _safeArray() in ui/interactive-preview-observation-renderer-v2.js only checked Array.isArray() and returned the caller's array unchanged, so a hostile array with a throwing index getter crashed downstream .filter()/.includes() calls
defectsFoundAndFixed.fix: Rewrote to perform genuine safe bounded projection (per-index try/catch, bounded length, never for...of/spread on the caller's array)

defectsFoundAndFixed.defect: Clear Observation, Clear Reasons, and Clear Session buttons measured only ~26px tall (below the ~44px touch-target guideline)
defectsFoundAndFixed.fix: Added min-height:44px and flex centering to all three buttons

finalDecision: CONDITIONAL PASS — Ready for EPIC 2E-J Phase D Release Closeout pending only physical-device/touch-hardware/screen-reader verification
